summary: Five leaf workers independently audited the collaboration-bus surface. Schema is declared (protocol.json v1.0) but only weakly enforced. Launcher correctly seeds collab/ ledgers and protocol.json idempotently for collab files but TRUNCATES child-agents.jsonl/swarm-state.json on rerun. Workflow traceability is broken by inconsistent timestamps, missing required 'evidence' on reviews, unilateral consensus (no quorum), missing 'adopt' ledger, and undocumented linkage fields (consensus_item_id vs adopted_items vs based_on vs source_item_id). Final bundle adoption fields are ad hoc and inconsistent across commanders (adopted_consensus_item_ids vs adopted_consensus vs adopted_items); merger report omits adoption entirely; no rejected/dissent accounting; no schema_version. Test coverage gap is high: tests/smoke-test.sh and tests/depth-guard-lint.sh exist but are NOT wired into CI; no schema validation, no atomic-append stress, no consensus workflow test, no adoption-field bundle test, no runtime banned-model enforcement test.

findings.summary: Per-commander child-agents.jsonl & swarm-state.json opened in 'w' mode by launcher, truncating prior records on rerun (bin/stampede.sh L851-860).
Consensus is unilateral: each consensus item authored by a single commander; no quorum field in protocol.json; commanders self-promote improvements.
Protocol declares 'adopt' as final stage but no adopt ledger exists and no finalization marker is emitted.
Final bundle adoption schema undocumented; commanders use divergent field names (adopted_consensus_item_ids, adopted_consensus, adopted_items); merger report has zero adoption fields.
CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) does NOT execute tests/smoke-test.sh or tests/depth-guard-lint.sh; protocol schema, atomic append, consensus workflow, and adoption fields are entirely untested.
Reviews.jsonl records omit required 'evidence' field declared in protocol.required_fields (schema/producer disagreement).
Cross-reference fields (target_item_id, based_on, consensus_item_id, verdict) are used in ledgers but undeclared in protocol.json.
Atomic-append semantics are guidance-only; launcher does not enforce O_APPEND/flock; no validator code consumes protocol.json.
Timestamp formats mix 'Z' and '+00:00' across commanders, breaking lexicographic ordering and monotonicity checks.
Commanders 002 and 004 dropped out after proposal stage with zero reviews/improvements/consensus/broadcast records and no detection.
SKILL.md and stampede-commander.agent.md contain ZERO documentation of the collaboration workflow; entire contract lives only in runtime prompt at bin/stampede.sh L909-910.
Causality violation: commander-001 improvements posted (01:11:39Z) before commander-003/005 reviews (01:14:38Z, 01:15:41Z) they would need to incorporate.
Tracing adopted item -> proposal_id is only partial (con-003-telemetry-pass has no based_on).
No final-bundle accounting for rejected/abstained/dissenting items; auditability incomplete.
protocol.json embeds absolute paths and lacks schema_version/min_reader_version compatibility policy.
item_id naming convention drifts across commanders (prop-c001-*, prop-003-*, commander-004-prop-001, prop-005-*).

evidence.quote: peer_review records omit 'evidence' key despite protocol marking it required
if metaswarm: collab_dir=...; for ledger_path in ledgers.values(): open(ledger_path,'a').close()
each consensus item authored by single commander; no quorum mechanism
line 1/2 use consensus_item_id; line 3 uses adopted_items -- inconsistent linkage
adopted_consensus[]; source_refs[] -- divergent naming from commander-001
merge report schema: run_id, merged_branch, timestamp, branches, summary, model_scores -- no adoption fields
CI does not execute tests/smoke-test.sh or tests/depth-guard-lint.sh
asserts fleet.json/swarm-state.json/child-agents.jsonl structure with --agent-cmd true (no-op); no real commander execution
banned model rejection at launcher only; no runtime enforcement test

recommendations: Add per-event JSON schemas (proposal/peer_review/improvement/consensus/broadcast/adopt) and a validator script wired into stampede-monitor.sh and CI.
Define quorum_required in protocol.json and require N-of-M peer endorsements before consensus promotion.
Add an adoptions ledger (or mandatory adopt event with consensus_item_id/proposal_item_ids[]) so the workflow closes.

Standardize the final bundle adoption schema with adoptions[] containing consensus_item_id, proposal_item_ids[], adopted_by, adoption_ts, adoption_reason, dissent[]; carry this schema into the merger report with schema_version.
Stop truncating child-agents.jsonl/swarm-state.json on rerun; open append-or-create and gate reset behind explicit --reset.
Wire tests/smoke-test.sh and tests/depth-guard-lint.sh into CI; add schema validation, atomic-append stress, consensus workflow, adoption-field, and runtime banned-model enforcement tests.
Document the collaboration bus as a first-class section in skills/SKILL.md and agents/stampede-commander.agent.md instead of relying solely on prompt injection.
Normalize ISO-8601 timestamps to a single format ('Z' suffix, no microseconds); enforce item_id regex; replace absolute ledger paths with relative names + base.
Make 'evidence' optional in protocol or fix the reviews emitter so producers and schema agree.
